avoid.reason: Limited historical accuracy edge and wide spread costs

notes: Macro environment classified as inflationary due to persistent 3.3% CPI, energy-driven price pressures, and Fed maintaining restrictive stance. Energy shock from Iran conflict creating tactical opportunities in inflation markets. GDP growth remains solid despite productivity puzzle, creating edge in GDP above 2% threshold. Fed policy markets mispricing dovish expectations given sustained inflation above target.
